story: Neymar participates in World Series of Poker tournament in Las Vegas after Brazil's early exit from 2026 World Cup
title: Neymar's Surprise Move
script: Neymar plays poker in Las Vegas. Brazil's early World Cup exit led him to the World Series of Poker tournament, a surprising turn of events. England and Argentina are now vying for the final, with their semifinal matches highly anticipated. The World Cup has taken a dramatic turn, with top teams competing fiercely. As Neymar takes a chance at the poker table, will his gamble pay off, or is he just passing time after a disappointing World Cup exit, and what's next for this soccer star?
